name: RABBIT-CAGE-13
title: rabbit-workspace is a skill but should be a slash command — violates Tool-Choice Tier
description: rabbit-workspace SKILL.md does nothing but run workspace-tree.sh and display output. No AI judgment, no branching. Per spec-rules.md Tool-Choice Tier (script beats CLI beats spec beats prompt), a skill is the lowest tier — prompt-level. Fix: convert to a slash command like rabbit-project.md, delegating to workspace-tree.sh. Retire the skill. Auto-trigger benefit can be achieved with a one-line note in CLAUDE.md.
